personal.name: Namitha T P
personal.title: Frontend Developer | React.js Developer
personal.summary: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable enterprise and government web applications using React.js, Redux, and modern JavaScript. Specialized in reusable component architecture, performance optimization, and REST API integration.

experience.company: National Institute of Smart Government (NISG) - UIDAI

Managing package version updates and resolving dependency conflicts.
Handling staging deployments using Gitea, Jenkins, and Argo CD.
Collaborating with backend and QA teams for seamless integration.
impact: Improved application security by replacing deprecated libraries.
Reduced technical debt through structured package upgrades.
Streamlined staging deployment process using CI/CD pipelines.
